metadata.title:
II BARGAIN DAILY SUNDAY PRESS 10 CENTS WEEK.-.7A

KISSING THE PRESIDENT


BAD FOR SUFFRAGETTES

pages.raw_text:
The mark of disfavor greeted
the president when he declared
that If suffrage should be granted
it would be exercised by the least
desirable element Taft declared
that not all women were interestd
in the movement and not all of
them desired the ballot.


Then the kissing started and it
took some minutes for the presid-
ing officer, Mrs. Rachel Foster
Avery, to restore order SO that the
address might continue.


Although the hall was quieted
and the president finished his ad-
dress, the affair has left an unfav-
orable impression. 1t is expected
that the delegates themselves will
take official notice of it and that
they will decry the occurrence.
